Ask anything. Type \"/\" for prompts, \": Ask anything. Type "/" for prompts, "@" for files, and "#" for tools.
Local model server is out of disk space: Local model server is out of disk space (cache full). Clear the engine's cache and try again.
Local model server is unavailable — it m: Local model server is unavailable — it may be loading the model or overloaded. Try again shortly.
Local model server did not respond in ti: Local model server did not respond in time (gateway/timeout). Check whether the engine is still running.
Local model server rejected the request: Local model server rejected the request due to too many concurrent calls.
Authentication with the local model serv: Authentication with the local model server failed. Check the API key configured for the engine.
Model not found on the local server. It: Model not found on the local server. It may have been unloaded or renamed.
Could not connect to the local model ser: Could not connect to the local model server at {{baseUrl}}. Check whether the engine is running.
Unknown failure while contacting the mod: Unknown failure while contacting the model.
